positive: Minimalist, symmetrical design featuring a stylized collection of abstract constellations and celestial bodies. The main subject is a luminous, interconnected network of stars forming recognizable zodiac patterns (e.g., Orion, Big Dipper) and wisps of nebula gas. Use strong, contrasting deep indigo and cosmic cyan colors against a matte black background. The style should be a sophisticated line art and glowing etching combination, reminiscent of high-end scientific engravings but with a modern, glowing neon pop. Composition must be perfectly centered and designed as a seamless graphic repeat for maximum print impact. High contrast, ultra-detailed linework, perfect symmetry, clean silhouettes.
negative: blur, grainy, noise, artifacts, text, watermarks, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, realistic photo, gradient fade, low contrast, dirty, sketch, logo, watermark
